summary: Bug Fixes Iteration 304 - All 3 critical bugs verified fixed: (1) SafeImage crossOrigin removed - R2 presigned URL images now load, (2) Gallery query filter expanded to include thumbnail_url OR output_url OR is_showcase - Gallery returns 48+ items, (3) Profile page links corrected to /app/story-video-studio. Backend: 13/13 tests passed. Frontend: All visual tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: SafeImage.jsx: crossOrigin='anonymous' correctly removed from img tag - images with R2 presigned URLs now load
pipeline_routes.py line 147-153: Gallery query $or filter now includes thumbnail_url, output_url, AND is_showcase conditions
Profile.js: All 5 links to /app/story-video-studio verified correct (lines 405, 465, 499, 774)
Explore API /api/public/explore returns presigned thumbnail_url for items with thumbnails
Gallery API /api/pipeline/gallery returns 48 items with presigned URLs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes verified: (1) SafeImage no longer has crossOrigin attribute blocking R2 URLs, (2) Gallery filter now includes items with thumbnail_url only (not requiring output_url), (3) Profile page links all point to /app/story-video-studio. Real thumbnails loading verified for 'A Cat's Big City Adventure' and 'Cosmo the Astronaut Cat in Space' on Explore page.

safeimage_crossorigin_fix.evidence: grep confirms no crossOrigin in SafeImage.jsx, Explore page shows actual cat images loading

gallery_filter_fix.evidence: GET /api/pipeline/gallery returns 48 items including those with thumbnail_url only

profile_link_fix.evidence: All Profile.js links use /app/story-video-studio, no broken /app/story-video links

explore_presigned_urls.evidence: API returns presigned R2 URLs, images accessible via HTTP HEAD

profile_tabs.evidence: All 5 tabs (My Space, My Jobs, Profile Settings, Security, Notifications) render and work

api_tests_summary.TestGalleryFilter: 5/5 passed - returns results, includes thumbnails, presigned URLs, categories, leaderboard
api_tests_summary.TestExploreEndpoint: 4/4 passed - trending, newest, most_remixed tabs, presigned thumbnails
api_tests_summary.TestImageAccessibility: 2/2 passed - thumbnail images accessible via HTTP

visual_verification.explore_page: Shows 'A Cat's Big City Adventure' with actual cat thumbnail image - crossOrigin fix working
visual_verification.gallery_page: 48 cards rendered, leaderboard shows items, categories working
visual_verification.profile_page: All tabs working, My Jobs shows 50 jobs with proper status badges
